channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Mustafa Bello takes over as Zenith Bank Group Chairman after Jim Ovia retires
item.description: Zenith Bank Plc don officially announce say Mustafa Bello don become the new Group Chairman as the founder and former chairman, Jim Ovia, don retire. The retirement follow the rules from Central Bank ...

item.title: Rising costs push up prices of traditional fish and chips in the UK
item.description: A traditional fish and chips shop in southeast London is highlighting the pressures facing the UK's iconic takeaway meal. Brockley’s Rock in Lewisham has seen the price of a typical portion of haddock...

item.title: BSEK Chairman Resigns Amid Irregularities in Karachi Matric Exams
item.description: The chairman of the Board of Secondary Education Karachi (BSEK), Ghulam Hussain Soho, resigned on Monday following a report suggesting his suspension due to alleged mismanagement during the ongoing ma...

item.title: DigiPlus considers expanding into related business areas
item.description: DigiPlus, a company operating in the Philippines, announced that it is exploring opportunities to expand into complementary segments of its business. While specific sectors were not detailed, the comp...

item.title: Three Ottawa Restaurants Recognized Among Canada’s Top 100
item.description: Three Ottawa restaurants have been recognised on Canada’s prestigious 100 Best Restaurants list, highlighting the city’s growing culinary scene. The inclusion reflects the dedication of local chefs an...

item.title: Four People Including NYSC Member Killed in Bandit Ambush on Jikamshi-Funtua Road in Katsina
item.description: Suspected armed bandits have killed four people, among them a National Youth Service Corps (NYSC) member, in a deadly ambush along the Jikamshi-Funtua road in Katsina State on Monday evening. The vict...

item.title: Kenyan Embassy in Rome Advertises Driver Jobs with Added Administrative Duties
item.description: The Kenyan Embassy in Rome has put out a call for experienced drivers to support its growing diplomatic activities in Italy. According to the advertisement released on 5th May 2026, the embassy is loo...

item.title: BSEK Chairman Steps Down Amid Reports of Exam Irregularities
item.description: In Karachi, Ghulam Hussain Soho has tendered his resignation as chairman of the Board of Secondary Education Karachi (BSEK) following reports of mismanagement in the ongoing matric examinations. The r...

item.title: US resumes visa processing for Nigerian doctors amid growing brain drain
item.description: The United States don resume visa processing for foreign doctors, including Nigerians, after dem suspend am since January due to broader travel restrictions. This suspension dey affect visa renewals, ...

item.title: Philippine and Allied Forces Conduct Joint Counter-Landing Exercise in Ilocos Norte
item.description: Philippine, US, Japanese, and Canadian forces joined together for a counter-landing live fire drill in Ilocos Norte as part of the Balikatan 2026 Exercise. The drill, held at La Paz Sand Dunes in Laoa...

item.title: Tech leaders urge regulation on AI to manage workplace job impacts
item.description: A Welsh tech entrepreneur, Charles Radclyffe, has raised concerns about the rapid adoption of artificial intelligence (AI) in workplaces and its potential to reduce employment opportunities. Radclyffe...

item.title: Raghav Chadha raises concerns over alleged political targeting by Punjab government
item.description: Rajya Sabha member Raghav Chadha has expressed serious concerns over what he describes as 'vendetta politics' by the Aam Aadmi Party (AAP)-led Punjab government. Speaking after a meeting with Presiden...

item.title: How Amelia Dimoldenberg Built Her YouTube Success Through Preparation and Ownership
item.description: Amelia Dimoldenberg, the creator and host of YouTube’s Chicken Shop Date, has built her online success by meticulously controlling every aspect of her work. From editing each episode to conducting in-...

item.title: Supreme Court Critiques Foundation of 2006 Sabarimala PIL During Review Hearings
item.description: The Supreme Court of India on Tuesday expressed strong reservations about the 2006 Public Interest Litigation that led to the 2018 verdict permitting women of all ages to enter the Sabarimala temple i...

item.title: Daily Horoscopes for Monday, May 4, 2026 by Georgia Nicols
item.description: The Chicago Sun-Times published its daily horoscope column for Monday, May 4, 2026, written by syndicated astrologer Georgia Nicols. The column begins with a moon alert advising readers to avoid shopp...

item.title: Wesfarmers warns rising costs may lead to higher prices at major retail stores
item.description: Wesfarmers, the parent company of Bunnings, Kmart, and Target, is facing significant cost pressures due to the ongoing conflict in the Middle East, which is impacting global supply chains. Chief Execu...

item.title: Meaningful Ways to Celebrate Moms During Mother’s Month
item.description: Mother’s Month is the perfect time to honor the incredible women who hold families together. This article highlights five thoughtful ways to celebrate moms, recognizing that each mom is unique and des...

item.title: Doris Fisher, Co-Founder of Gap, Passes Away at Age 94
item.description: Doris Fisher, wey be co-founder of the American clothing company Gap, don die at 94. According to statement wey the company release on Monday, she die peacefully surrounded by her family. The company ...

item.title: Swiss man stands trial for murdering wife and attempting to destroy her body
item.description: Marc Rieben, a 43-year-old Swiss businessman, is on trial for the 2024 murder of his wife, Kristina Joksimovic, a former Miss Switzerland finalist. Prosecutors allege that Rieben attacked Kristina wit...

item.title: Indian Illustrator Anand RK and Journalist Suparna Sharma Awarded Pulitzer for Visual Reporting on Digital Surveillance
item.description: In a remarkable achievement for Indian journalism and visual arts, illustrator Anand RK and investigative journalist Suparna Sharma, along with Bloomberg’s Natalie Obiko Pearson, have been awarded the...
